nasb.text: You shall not marry a woman in addition to her sister as a rival while she is alive, to uncover her nakedness.

esv.text: And you shall not take a woman as a rival wife to her sister, uncovering her nakedness while her sister is still alive.

cnv.text: 妻子還活著的時候，你不可另娶她的姊妹，作她的情敵，揭露她的下體。

ccb.text: 妻子还在世时，不可娶她的姊妹，与她的姊妹性交，使她们彼此作对。
